title: Are you guys seeing this?
prompt_text: A close-up, low-angle shot of a tabby cat taking a selfie on a paved surface, possibly a sidewalk or street. The cat has bright green eyes and is wearing a collar with a small bell. In the blurred background, several large rats are gathered around a piece of pizza, with a warm, sunset-like glow illuminating the scene. Cars and buildings are vaguely visible in the distant background, hinting at an urban setting.

prompt_data.sceneDescription: A close-up, low-angle shot of a tabby cat taking a selfie on a paved surface, possibly a sidewalk or street. The cat has bright green eyes and is wearing a collar with a small bell. In the blurred background, several large rats are gathered around a piece of pizza, with a warm, sunset-like glow illuminating the scene. Cars and buildings are vaguely visible in the distant background, hinting at an urban setting.

cinematography.cameraShot: Low-angle, close-up shot, mimicking a selfie taken by the cat. The camera is static.

actions: The tabby cat looks directly at the camera with wide eyes.
The cat slightly blinks its eyes.
The cat's tongue briefly extends and retracts, licking its nose.
dialogue: [Ambient urban sounds: faint traffic, indistinct chattering]
